context_text: <A> and hum i took nitequil a couple nights ago { and huh } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> and honest to god i huh it was really strange i took it and i couldn't fall asleep and i think i feel a sleep and the phone rang and distracted me then / <B> mhm / <A> all the sudden it felt like i had slept for eight hours and i thought it was eight o'clock in the morning and but it was really twelve fifteen at night then i couldn't sleep for the rest of the night and i took a normal dosage it was really the and the next night i took tylenol pm and i woke up feeling was better than with the nyquil / <B> mhm
